mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_bid (auction_id, member_id, bid_price, is_winning) VALUES (#{auctionId}, #{memberId}, #{bidPrice}, #{isWinning})
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.auction_id, b.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, b.bid_price, b.is_winning, b.created_datetime FROM tbl_bid b JOIN tbl_member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY b.bid_price DESC, b.created_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_bid SET is_winning = false WHERE auction_id = #{auctionId} AND is_winning = true
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.auction_id, b.member_id, m.nickname AS member_nickname, b.bid_price, b.is_winning, b.created_datetime FROM tbl_bid b JOIN tbl_member m ON b.member_id = m.id WHERE b.auction_id = #{auctionId} ORDER BY b.bid_price DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id AS auction_id, a.work_id, w.title AS work_title, wf.file_url AS work_thumbnail, a.seller_id, seller.nickname AS seller_nickname, my_bid.my_bid_price, a.current_price, a.final_price, CASE WHEN a.status = 'SOLD' THEN 'SOLD' WHEN a.status = 'CLOSED' OR a.closing_at <= now() THEN 'CLOSED' ELSE a.status END AS status, CASE WHEN a.status = 'SOLD' AND a.winner_id = #{memberId} THEN true WHEN (a.status = 'CLOSED' OR a.closing_at <= now()) AND a.current_price = my_bid.my_bid_price THEN true ELSE false END AS is_winning, a.closing_at, my_bid.last_bid_at FROM tbl_auction a JOIN tbl_work w ON a.work_id = w.id JOIN tbl_member seller ON a.seller_id = seller.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT wf.file_url FROM tbl_work_file wf WHERE wf.work_id = a.work_id ORDER BY wf.sort_order ASC, wf.id ASC LIMIT 1 ) wf ON true JOIN ( SELECT b.auction_id, MAX(b.bid_price) AS my_bid_price, MAX(b.created_datetime) AS last_bid_at FROM tbl_bid b WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY b.auction_id ) my_bid ON my_bid.auction_id = a.id WHERE a.status IN ('CLOSED', 'SOLD') OR a.closing_at <= now() ORDER BY a.closing_at DESC, my_bid.last_bid_at DESC
